review_note: Appeal dates are inconsistent: narrative states the Governor appealed "on May 23, 2007, and on May 27, 2008" (the 2007 year appears to be a typo); appeal_date set to 2008-05-27. IA was requested for 15 counties but no IA county names are given; the 21 named counties are from the PA countywide per-capita list (PA requested, denial so nothing granted).
